title: Go Test Generator Result
description: Structured output from the QualityFlow Go test generator agent. Validated by the harness before the post-script runs.

test_files.description: Paths to generated Go test files (relative to repo root, with qf_ prefix)

target_directory.description: Source package directory where test files were co-located, or null for fallback mode

output_mode.description: Whether tests were placed in the source tree or in outputs/

build_verified.description: Whether the generated tests passed build verification

compile_gate_passed.description: Whether generated tests passed the compile gate (go test -run='^$')

lsp_patterns.description: Path to extracted LSP patterns YAML
